trans-unit.source: Lore is displayed through the LoreScroll component: an elegantly typeset reading experience using the Bureau font (Spectral serif) with themed section headers, paragraph spacing, and optional lore illustrations. The visual design adapts to each simulation’s theme – dark brutalist for Velgarien, Victorian gaslight for The Gaslit Reach, deep-space horror for Station Null.
trans-unit.target: Lore is displayed through the LoreScroll component: an elegantly typeset reading experience using the Bureau font (Spectral serif) with themed section headers, paragraph spacing, and optional lore illustrations. The visual design adapts to each simulation’s theme – dark brutalist for Velgarien, Victorian gaslight for The Gaslit Reach, deep-space horror for Station Null.

trans-unit.source: Lore is publicly visible – anyone can browse a simulation’s lore without logging in. It serves as the world’s identity and helps players understand the thematic context before joining an epoch.
trans-unit.target: Lore is publicly visible – anyone can browse a simulation’s lore without logging in. It serves as the world’s identity and helps players understand the thematic context before joining an epoch.

trans-unit.source: The Simulation Health dashboard shows the mechanical state of your world through four computed metrics: Building Readiness, Zone Stability, Embassy Effectiveness, and overall Simulation Health. These metrics directly feed into epoch scoring – they’re not just flavor, they determine your score.
trans-unit.target: The Simulation Health dashboard shows the mechanical state of your world through four computed metrics: Building Readiness, Zone Stability, Embassy Effectiveness, and overall Simulation Health. These metrics directly feed into epoch scoring – they’re not just flavor, they determine your score.

trans-unit.source: The workflow is: Fetch → Transform → Integrate. First, browse or search real-world articles. Then, select an article and transform it – the AI rewrites the story through your simulation’s lens, matching its theme, tone, and internal logic. Finally, integrate the transformed content as a new simulation event, optionally linking it to a campaign.
trans-unit.target: The workflow is: Fetch → Transform → Integrate. First, browse or search real-world articles. Then, select an article and transform it – the AI rewrites the story through your simulation’s lens, matching its theme, tone, and internal logic. Finally, integrate the transformed content as a new simulation event, optionally linking it to a campaign.

trans-unit.source: Campaigns group related events into thematic narratives – a propaganda initiative, an influence operation, or a social movement. Each campaign tracks engagement metrics and links back to its source events. The campaign dashboard shows an overview of all active campaigns with performance analytics.
trans-unit.target: Campaigns group related events into thematic narratives – a propaganda initiative, an influence operation, or a social movement. Each campaign tracks engagement metrics and links back to its source events. The campaign dashboard shows an overview of all active campaigns with performance analytics.

trans-unit.source: The COMMS sidebar on the Epoch Operations Board provides real-time communication during competitive play. Two channels are available: ALL CHANNELS broadcasts to every participant, while TEAM FREQ is restricted to your alliance members. Messages update in real time via WebSocket – no page refresh needed.
trans-unit.target: The COMMS sidebar on the Epoch Operations Board provides real-time communication during competitive play. Two channels are available: ALL CHANNELS broadcasts to every participant, while TEAM FREQ is restricted to your alliance members. Messages update in real time via WebSocket – no page refresh needed.

trans-unit.source: The presence indicator shows which players are currently online with a green dot. The ready signal system lets you indicate when you’ve completed your actions for the current cycle. When all human participants signal ready, the cycle auto-resolves – no waiting for the timer.
trans-unit.target: The presence indicator shows which players are currently online with a green dot. The ready signal system lets you indicate when you’ve completed your actions for the current cycle. When all human participants signal ready, the cycle auto-resolves – no waiting for the timer.

trans-unit.source: Use the COMMS to coordinate alliance strategy, negotiate truces, or bluff about your next move. Everything said in ALL CHANNELS is visible to all players – use TEAM FREQ for sensitive coordination.
trans-unit.target: Use the COMMS to coordinate alliance strategy, negotiate truces, or bluff about your next move. Everything said in ALL CHANNELS is visible to all players – use TEAM FREQ for sensitive coordination.

trans-unit.source: After each cycle resolves, all participants receive a tactical briefing email. The email is bilingual (EN/DE), fog-of-war compliant (you only see your own operations), and includes your current rank, score gaps, mission outcomes, spy intel summaries, threat assessments, and a preview of the next cycle phase. Emails respect notification preferences – opt out anytime in Settings.
trans-unit.target: After each cycle resolves, all participants receive a tactical briefing email. The email is bilingual (EN/DE), fog-of-war compliant (you only see your own operations), and includes your current rank, score gaps, mission outcomes, spy intel summaries, threat assessments, and a preview of the next cycle phase. Emails respect notification preferences – opt out anytime in Settings.

trans-unit.source: Unlocks at 50 total commands during an active epoch. The terminal becomes a tactical command center connected to the epoch war effort. Eight commands bridge the terminal with the epoch interface: sitrep (AI tactical briefing), dossier (intelligence file on opponent), threats (incoming operative detection), intercept (counter-intelligence sweep), deploy (operative deployment), ally (alliance proposals), broadcast (public messaging), and encrypt (private messaging).
trans-unit.target: Unlocks at 50 total commands during an active epoch. The terminal becomes a tactical command center connected to the epoch war effort. Eight commands bridge the terminal with the epoch interface: sitrep (AI tactical briefing), dossier (intelligence file on opponent), threats (incoming operative detection), intercept (counter-intelligence sweep), deploy (operative deployment), ally (alliance proposals), broadcast (public messaging), and encrypt (private messaging).

trans-unit.source: Sitrep produces an AI-generated battlefield assessment covering zone stability trends, operative activity, and recommended priorities. Dossier compiles intelligence on a specific opponent including their operative history, scoring trajectory, and alliance status. Intercept costs 4 RP and functions like a counter-intelligence sweep from the terminal. Deploy, ally, broadcast, and encrypt redirect to their respective epoch interface tabs for execution.
trans-unit.target: Sitrep produces an AI-generated battlefield assessment covering zone stability trends, operative activity, and recommended priorities. Dossier compiles intelligence on a specific opponent including their operative history, scoring trajectory, and alliance status. Intercept costs 4 RP and functions like a counter-intelligence sweep from the terminal. Deploy, ally, broadcast, and encrypt redirect to their respective epoch interface tabs for execution.

trans-unit.source: Deploy only 1 guardian during foundation, save the rest. You enter competition with 35+ RP – enough for an assassin + saboteur on cycle 4. Risky: undefended zones are vulnerable. Best with Warmonger preset where early military points compound.
trans-unit.target: Deploy only 1 guardian during foundation, save the rest. You enter competition with 35+ RP – enough for an assassin + saboteur on cycle 4. Risky: undefended zones are vulnerable. Best with Warmonger preset where early military points compound.

trans-unit.source: Deploy 2–3 guardians, keep a moderate RP reserve (15–20). Covers key zones without sacrificing offensive capability. The safest opener – works with any preset and adapts to opponent behavior.
trans-unit.target: Deploy 2–3 guardians, keep a moderate RP reserve (15–20). Covers key zones without sacrificing offensive capability. The safest opener – works with any preset and adapts to opponent behavior.

trans-unit.source: A sweep costs 4 RP. Use it when you suspect incoming propagandists or saboteurs – not every cycle. A detected enemy mission costs THEM −3 military AND negates their effect. One well-timed sweep can swing 10+ points.
trans-unit.target: A sweep costs 4 RP. Use it when you suspect incoming propagandists or saboteurs – not every cycle. A detected enemy mission costs THEM −3 military AND negates their effect. One well-timed sweep can swing 10+ points.

trans-unit.source: Each guardian reduces enemy success by 6% (capped at −15% total). Three guardians reach the cap. Forces enemies to target undefended zones instead. But 12 RP on defense is 12 RP not spent on offense – only stack when protecting high-value buildings.
trans-unit.target: Each guardian reduces enemy success by 6% (capped at −15% total). Three guardians reach the cap. Forces enemies to target undefended zones instead. But 12 RP on defense is 12 RP not spent on offense – only stack when protecting high-value buildings.

trans-unit.source: Infiltrators reduce your embassy effectiveness by 65% for 3 cycles. Counter by deploying your own infiltrator against their embassy – mutual neutralization. Or stack guardians near embassy zones to prevent infiltration entirely.
trans-unit.target: Infiltrators reduce your embassy effectiveness by 65% for 3 cycles. Counter by deploying your own infiltrator against their embassy – mutual neutralization. Or stack guardians near embassy zones to prevent infiltration entirely.

trans-unit.source: With 40% military weight, every successful mission is massive (+5 saboteur, +8 assassin, +6 infiltrator). But detected missions (−3 each) hurt double. Go all-in on offense with spies for intel, then targeted strikes. Accept defensive losses – stability only counts for 10%.
trans-unit.target: With 40% military weight, every successful mission is massive (+5 saboteur, +8 assassin, +6 infiltrator). But detected missions (−3 each) hurt double. Go all-in on offense with spies for intel, then targeted strikes. Accept defensive losses – stability only counts for 10%.

trans-unit.source: Special agent status – targeted by assassins
trans-unit.target: Special agent status – targeted by assassins

trans-unit.source: New intro: What is metaverse.center? – sandbox vs competitive modes
trans-unit.target: Neues Intro: Was ist metaverse.center? – Sandbox- vs. Wettbewerbsmodus

trans-unit.source: Fortifications are hidden – only revealed by enemy spy intel reports

trans-unit.source: No simulation membership required – just pick a faction and play
trans-unit.target: Keine Simulationsmitgliedschaft erforderlich – wähle eine Fraktion und spiele

trans-unit.source: Game-theoretic optimal play is pure ci_defensive. The meta is solved – defensive play dominates all alternatives at 64% win rate.
trans-unit.target: Game-theoretic optimal play is pure ci_defensive. The meta is solved – defensive play dominates all alternatives at 64% win rate.

trans-unit.source: What is metaverse.center? Simulations, lore, health, and the substrate pulse.
trans-unit.target: Was ist metaverse.center? Simulationen, Überlieferung, Gesundheit und der Substrat-Puls.

trans-unit.source: AI-driven simulations with agents, buildings, events, geography, and lore
trans-unit.target: KI-gesteuerte Simulationen mit Agenten, Gebäuden, Ereignissen, Geographie und Überlieferung

trans-unit.source: Two modes: sandbox (build and explore) and competitive (Epochs)
trans-unit.target: Zwei Modi: Sandbox (bauen und erkunden) und Wettbewerb (Epochen)

trans-unit.source: Simulation health tracks building readiness, zone stability, and embassy effectiveness
trans-unit.target: Simulationsgesundheit verfolgt Gebäudebereitschaft, Zonenstabilität und Botschaftseffektivität

trans-unit.source: The substrate pulse ticks every 4 hours, driving narrative arcs and zone dynamics
trans-unit.target: Der Substrat-Puls tickt alle 4 Stunden und treibt Erzählbögen und Zonendynamik voran

trans-unit.source: metaverse.center is a platform for creating and managing AI-driven simulations – fictional worlds with agents, buildings, events, geography, and lore. Each simulation is a living sandbox: agents have personalities and memories, events shape the narrative, and AI generates everything from character dialogue to newspaper editions.
trans-unit.target: metaverse.center is a platform for creating and managing AI-driven simulations – fictional worlds with agents, buildings, events, geography, and lore. Each simulation is a living sandbox: agents have personalities and memories, events shape the narrative, and AI generates everything from character dialogue to newspaper editions.

trans-unit.source: In sandbox mode, you build and explore your world – create agents, generate events, chat with characters, import real-world news, and craft lore. In competitive mode, simulations enter Epochs: time-limited PvP matches where players deploy operatives, form alliances, and compete across five scoring dimensions.
trans-unit.target: In sandbox mode, you build and explore your world – create agents, generate events, chat with characters, import real-world news, and craft lore. In competitive mode, simulations enter Epochs: time-limited PvP matches where players deploy operatives, form alliances, and compete across five scoring dimensions.

trans-unit.source: Create a complete AI-generated world from a single seed idea in 15 minutes.
trans-unit.target: Create a complete AI-generated world from a single seed idea in 15 minutes.

trans-unit.source: Four-phase wizard: Astrolabe, Drafting Table, Darkroom, Ignition
trans-unit.target: Four-phase wizard: Astrolabe, Drafting Table, Darkroom, Ignition

trans-unit.source: AI generates geography, agents, buildings, lore, and a visual identity
trans-unit.target: AI generates geography, agents, buildings, lore, and a visual identity

trans-unit.target: Every result is unique – same seed, different anchor, radically different world

trans-unit.target: Ignition is permanent and consumes 1 Forge Token

trans-unit.source: Talk to AI agents who remember your conversations and develop over time.
trans-unit.target: Talk to AI agents who remember your conversations and develop over time.

trans-unit.target: Agents have personalities, memories, and opinions that evolve

trans-unit.target: Chat uses 50-message context + semantic memory retrieval (pgvector)

trans-unit.target: Events drive the narrative: manual, AI-generated, or spawned by game mechanics.

trans-unit.target: Events have impact levels (1–10), types, tags, and a status lifecycle

trans-unit.target: High-impact events trigger zone pressure, cascades, and cross-simulation bleed

trans-unit.target: Social Trends imports real-world news and transforms it into simulation events

trans-unit.target: Zone security levels (Low–Critical) directly affect operative success rates

trans-unit.target: Agent autonomy: moods, needs, opinions, relationships, and autonomous events.

trans-unit.target: Agents act autonomously between visits – moods shift, relationships form, events fire

trans-unit.source: Agent mood affects epoch performance: happy agents get +3% operative success

trans-unit.target: Interactive force-directed graph of the entire multiverse and active epochs.

trans-unit.source: Nodes are simulations, edges are cross-dimensional connections

trans-unit.source: Time-limited PvP seasons scored across five dimensions. The competitive core.

trans-unit.target: Epochs clone simulations into balanced game instances – originals stay untouched

trans-unit.source: Five phases: Lobby, Foundation (+50% RP), Competition, Reckoning (amplified bleed), Completed
trans-unit.target: Five phases: Lobby, Foundation (+50% RP), Competition, Reckoning (amplified bleed), Completed

trans-unit.source: All simulations normalized at start: 6 agents, 8 buildings, balanced security
trans-unit.target: All simulations normalized at start: 6 agents, 8 buildings, balanced security

trans-unit.source: Academy Mode: solo sprint training against AI bots with compressed cycles
trans-unit.target: Academy Mode: solo sprint training against AI bots with compressed cycles

trans-unit.source: Open the Epoch Command Center from your simulation, choose a scoring preset, set the cycle duration, and launch. You can invite players via email – each invitation includes a lore-flavored dossier generated by AI.
trans-unit.target: Open the Epoch Command Center from your simulation, choose a scoring preset, set the cycle duration, and launch. You can invite players via email – each invitation includes a lore-flavored dossier generated by AI.

trans-unit.source: Solo training against 2–4 AI bot opponents in a sprint format. Academy epochs use a compressed timeline (3-day duration, 4-hour cycles) so you can experience a full competitive season in a single afternoon. Launch from your Dashboard with a single click.
trans-unit.target: Solo training against 2–4 AI bot opponents in a sprint format. Academy epochs use a compressed timeline (3-day duration, 4-hour cycles) so you can experience a full competitive season in a single afternoon. Launch from your Dashboard with a single click.

trans-unit.source: Academy mode uses the same mechanics as full competitive epochs – the same operative types, scoring dimensions, alliance systems, and fog of war. Use it to experiment with strategies, test agent draft compositions, and learn how different bot personalities respond to pressure.
trans-unit.target: Academy mode uses the same mechanics as full competitive epochs – the same operative types, scoring dimensions, alliance systems, and fog of war. Use it to experiment with strategies, test agent draft compositions, and learn how different bot personalities respond to pressure.

trans-unit.source: Six operative types with unique costs, timings, and effects. Deploy wisely.
trans-unit.target: Six operative types with unique costs, timings, and effects. Deploy wisely.

trans-unit.source: Six types: Spy, Saboteur, Propagandist, Assassin, Guardian, Infiltrator
trans-unit.target: Six types: Spy, Saboteur, Propagandist, Assassin, Guardian, Infiltrator

trans-unit.source: Each costs RP, takes deploy + mission cycles, and has a score value on success
trans-unit.target: Each costs RP, takes deploy + mission cycles, and has a score value on success

trans-unit.source: Success probability: 55% base + aptitude bonus − zone security − guardian defense
trans-unit.target: Success probability: 55% base + aptitude bonus − zone security − guardian defense

trans-unit.source: Detected missions cost −3 military and negate the effect
trans-unit.target: Detected missions cost −3 military and negate the effect

trans-unit.source: Operatives are the instruments of warfare in an epoch. Deploy them to gather intelligence, sabotage infrastructure, spread propaganda, eliminate targets, defend zones, or compromise embassies. Each type has unique costs, timings, and effects.
trans-unit.target: Operatives are the instruments of warfare in an epoch. Deploy them to gather intelligence, sabotage infrastructure, spread propaganda, eliminate targets, defend zones, or compromise embassies. Each type has unique costs, timings, and effects.

trans-unit.source: Success: the operative completes its mission and earns score value. Failed: the mission has no effect but is not detected. Detected: the mission fails AND you lose 3 military score. Counter-intelligence sweeps (4 RP) increase detection chance.
trans-unit.target: Success: the operative completes its mission and earns score value. Failed: the mission has no effect but is not detected. Detected: the mission fails AND you lose 3 military score. Counter-intelligence sweeps (4 RP) increase detection chance.

trans-unit.source: Ambassadors are special agent statuses that boost embassy effectiveness and feed into the diplomatic scoring formula. They are prime targets for assassins.
trans-unit.target: Ambassadors are special agent statuses that boost embassy effectiveness and feed into the diplomatic scoring formula. They are prime targets for assassins.

trans-unit.source: Five scoring dimensions, RP economy, weighted presets, and the composite formula.
trans-unit.target: Five scoring dimensions, RP economy, weighted presets, and the composite formula.

trans-unit.source: Five dimensions: Stability, Influence, Sovereignty, Diplomatic, Military
trans-unit.target: Five dimensions: Stability, Influence, Sovereignty, Diplomatic, Military

trans-unit.source: Weighted presets (Balanced, Builder, Warmonger, Diplomat) shape strategy
trans-unit.target: Weighted presets (Balanced, Builder, Warmonger, Diplomat) shape strategy

trans-unit.source: RP economy: 12/cycle base, 40 cap, Foundation +50% bonus
trans-unit.target: RP economy: 12/cycle base, 40 cap, Foundation +50% bonus

trans-unit.source: Each dimension has a title awarded to its leader (The Unshaken, The Resonant, etc.)
trans-unit.target: Each dimension has a title awarded to its leader (The Unshaken, The Resonant, etc.)

trans-unit.source: Form alliances, share intelligence, manage tension, and risk betrayal.
trans-unit.target: Form alliances, share intelligence, manage tension, and risk betrayal.

trans-unit.source: Each ally gives +15% diplomatic score; a 3-member alliance means +30% each
trans-unit.target: Each ally gives +15% diplomatic score; a 3-member alliance means +30% each

trans-unit.source: Alliance upkeep: 1 RP per member per cycle (scales with size)
trans-unit.target: Alliance upkeep: 1 RP per member per cycle (scales with size)

trans-unit.source: Tension rises on target overlap (+10) and decays naturally (−5/cycle); at 80 the alliance dissolves
trans-unit.target: Tension rises on target overlap (+10) and decays naturally (−5/cycle); at 80 the alliance dissolves

trans-unit.source: Betrayal risk: detected attack on ally = −25% diplomatic score penalty
trans-unit.target: Betrayal risk: detected attack on ally = −25% diplomatic score penalty

trans-unit.source: Alliance tension rises when allies attack the same target (+10 per overlap). It decays naturally each cycle (−5). If tension reaches 80, the alliance automatically dissolves and all members become unaligned. Coordinate your targets to keep tension low.
trans-unit.target: Alliance tension rises when allies attack the same target (+10 per overlap). It decays naturally each cycle (−5). If tension reaches 80, the alliance automatically dissolves and all members become unaligned. Coordinate your targets to keep tension low.

trans-unit.source: Bleed, echoes, resonances, results screen, and cross-simulation warfare.
trans-unit.target: Bleed, echoes, resonances, results screen, and cross-simulation warfare.

trans-unit.source: Events above impact threshold bleed into connected simulations as echoes
trans-unit.target: Events above impact threshold bleed into connected simulations as echoes

trans-unit.source: Seven bleed vectors (Commerce, Language, Memory, Resonance, Architecture, Dream, Desire)
trans-unit.target: Seven bleed vectors (Commerce, Language, Memory, Resonance, Architecture, Dream, Desire)

trans-unit.source: Substrate Resonances modify gameplay: boost/suppress operative types, alter RP, shift scores
trans-unit.target: Substrate Resonances modify gameplay: boost/suppress operative types, alter RP, shift scores

trans-unit.source: Results screen reveals all operations with podium, commendations, and dimension breakdowns
trans-unit.target: Results screen reveals all operations with podium, commendations, and dimension breakdowns

trans-unit.source: When events in one simulation exceed the bleed threshold, they echo into connected worlds through dimensional vectors. Resonances emerge from event clustering. The results screen lifts the fog of war. These systems create emergent cross-simulation warfare.
trans-unit.target: When events in one simulation exceed the bleed threshold, they echo into connected worlds through dimensional vectors. Resonances emerge from event clustering. The results screen lifts the fog of war. These systems create emergent cross-simulation warfare.

trans-unit.source: Echoes can cascade: an echo arriving in a simulation may trigger events above the threshold in that simulation, generating secondary echoes. Cascade depth is limited to prevent infinite loops but increases during Reckoning phase.
trans-unit.target: Echoes can cascade: an echo arriving in a simulation may trigger events above the threshold in that simulation, generating secondary echoes. Cascade depth is limited to prevent infinite loops but increases during Reckoning phase.

trans-unit.source: During Reckoning phase, the bleed threshold drops by 2 and cascade depth increases by 1. This means more events bleed, and bleed chains go deeper. The multiverse becomes more volatile just when scores matter most.
trans-unit.target: During Reckoning phase, the bleed threshold drops by 2 and cascade depth increases by 1. This means more events bleed, and bleed chains go deeper. The multiverse becomes more volatile just when scores matter most.

trans-unit.source: Gold, silver, and bronze placements with animated score count-ups and dimension titles. Each winner’s strongest scoring dimension is highlighted – "Master of Influence" or "Sovereign Defender" – giving flavor to the final standings.
trans-unit.target: Gold, silver, and bronze placements with animated score count-ups and dimension titles. Each winner’s strongest scoring dimension is highlighted – "Master of Influence" or "Sovereign Defender" – giving flavor to the final standings.

trans-unit.source: Five commendation titles: Master Spy (highest military impact), Iron Guardian (strongest sovereignty defense), The Diplomat (highest diplomatic score), Most Lethal (best operative success rate), Cultural Domination (greatest influence spread). Multiple awards can go to the same player.
trans-unit.target: Five commendation titles: Master Spy (highest military impact), Iron Guardian (strongest sovereignty defense), The Diplomat (highest diplomatic score), Most Lethal (best operative success rate), Cultural Domination (greatest influence spread). Multiple awards can go to the same player.

trans-unit.source: Animated breakdown bars for all five scoring dimensions with per-participant breakdowns. See exactly where each player dominated and where they were vulnerable. All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion.
trans-unit.target: Animated breakdown bars for all five scoring dimensions with per-participant breakdowns. See exactly where each player dominated and where they were vulnerable. All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion.

trans-unit.source: Text-based command interface: 30 commands across 4 tiers, CRT aesthetic.
trans-unit.target: Text-based command interface: 30 commands across 4 tiers, CRT aesthetic.

trans-unit.source: Type commands instead of clicking dashboards – local perspective, zone-limited view
trans-unit.target: Type commands instead of clicking dashboards – local perspective, zone-limited view

trans-unit.source: Tier 1 (Observation): look, go, examine, talk, status, map, where, weather, help
trans-unit.target: Tier 1 (Observation): look, go, examine, talk, status, map, where, weather, help

trans-unit.source: Tier 2 (Field Ops, 10 cmds): fortify, quarantine, assign – costs Operations Points
trans-unit.target: Tier 2 (Field Ops, 10 cmds): fortify, quarantine, assign – costs Operations Points

trans-unit.source: Tier 3 (Intel, 25 cmds): scan, investigate, debrief, ask – costs Intel Points
trans-unit.target: Tier 3 (Intel, 25 cmds): scan, investigate, debrief, ask – costs Intel Points

trans-unit.source: Click an ability for each agent below
trans-unit.target: Klicke eine Fähigkeit für jeden Agenten unten

trans-unit.source: Attack abilities require an enemy target
Press EXECUTE when all agents have orders
trans-unit.target: Drücke AUSFÜHREN wenn alle Agenten Befehle haben

trans-unit.source: No dungeon archetypes detected in this simulation.
trans-unit.target: Keine Dungeon-Archetypen in dieser Simulation erkannt.

trans-unit.source: Type 'dungeon' in the terminal to start a run.
trans-unit.target: Tippe 'dungeon' im Terminal um eine Expedition zu starten.

trans-unit.source: Procedural dungeons born from substrate resonances. Combat, loot, and permanent agent upgrades.
trans-unit.target: Prozedurale Dungeons, geboren aus Substrat-Resonanzen. Kampf, Loot und permanente Agenten-Verbesserungen.

trans-unit.source: Substrate resonances spawn explorable dungeons with FTL-style node maps
trans-unit.target: Substrat-Resonanzen erzeugen erkundbare Dungeons mit FTL-artigen Knotenkarten

trans-unit.source: Phase-based combat: 30-second planning phase, then simultaneous resolution
trans-unit.target: Phasenbasierter Kampf: 30 Sekunden Planungsphase, dann gleichzeitige Auflösung

trans-unit.source: 8 dungeon archetypes – each tied to a resonance type with unique enemies and encounters
trans-unit.target: 8 Dungeon-Archetypen – jeder an einen Resonanztyp gebunden, mit einzigartigen Feinden und Begegnungen

trans-unit.source: Loot grants permanent aptitude boosts (+2 cap per agent), memories, and moodlets
trans-unit.target: Loot gewährt permanente Eignungs-Verstärkungen (+2 pro Agent), Erinnerungen und Moodlets

trans-unit.source: Party of up to 4 agents – condition tracks from Operational to Afflicted
trans-unit.target: Trupp aus bis zu 4 Agenten – Zustandsverlauf von Einsatzbereit bis Gezeichnet

trans-unit.source: Resonance Dungeons transform substrate resonances into explorable procedural dungeons. When a resonance event occurs in your simulation, it may open a dungeon tied to that resonance archetype. Each dungeon is a branching node graph – inspired by FTL – where your agents explore rooms, face encounters, and fight enemies shaped by the resonance that spawned the dungeon.
trans-unit.target: Resonanz-Dungeons verwandeln Substrat-Resonanzen in erkundbare prozedurale Dungeons. Wenn ein Resonanz-Ereignis in deiner Simulation auftritt, kann es einen Dungeon öffnen, der an diesen Resonanz-Archetyp gebunden ist. Jeder Dungeon ist ein verzweigter Knotengraph – inspiriert von FTL – in dem deine Agenten Räume erkunden, Begegnungen meistern und Feinde bekämpfen, die von der Resonanz geformt wurden, die den Dungeon hervorgebracht hat.

trans-unit.source: Navigate to the Terminal tab and type "dungeon" to see available dungeons. Select an archetype and choose your party (up to 4 agents). The dungeon launches in the terminal with a submarine war room HUD showing the map, party status, and combat interface.
trans-unit.target: Navigiere zum Terminal-Tab und tippe "dungeon" um verfügbare Dungeons zu sehen. Wähle einen Archetyp und stelle deinen Trupp zusammen (bis zu 4 Agenten). Der Dungeon startet im Terminal mit einem U-Boot-Kriegsraum-HUD, das die Karte, den Trupp-Status und die Kampfoberfläche anzeigt.

trans-unit.source: Gameplay flows through room exploration: move between connected nodes on the dungeon map, each containing encounters, treasure, rest points, or the final boss. Encounters range from skill checks (using agent aptitudes and personality) to full combat sequences. Rooms you have visited are marked; rooms ahead show threat indicators based on scouting.
trans-unit.target: Das Gameplay verläuft über Raumerkundung: Bewege dich zwischen verbundenen Knoten auf der Dungeon-Karte, von denen jeder Begegnungen, Schätze, Rastpunkte oder den Endboss enthält. Begegnungen reichen von Fähigkeitsprüfungen (basierend auf Agenten-Eignungen und Persönlichkeit) bis zu vollständigen Kampfsequenzen. Besuchte Räume werden markiert; vorausliegende Räume zeigen Bedrohungsindikatoren basierend auf Erkundung.

trans-unit.source: Combat is phase-based. During the 30-second planning phase, assign abilities from 6 schools (one per operative type) to your agents. Then the round resolves simultaneously – your agents and the enemies act at the same time. Agents have condition tracks (Operational, Stressed, Wounded, Afflicted) and accumulate stress. If the entire party is defeated, the run is wiped and agents suffer trauma outcomes.
trans-unit.target: Der Kampf ist phasenbasiert. Während der 30-sekündigen Planungsphase weist du deinen Agenten Fähigkeiten aus 6 Schulen (eine pro Agententyp) zu. Dann wird die Runde gleichzeitig aufgelöst – deine Agenten und die Feinde handeln zur selben Zeit. Agenten haben Zustandsverläufe (Einsatzbereit, Gestresst, Verwundet, Gezeichnet) und akkumulieren Stress. Wird der gesamte Trupp besiegt, ist die Expedition gescheitert und die Agenten erleiden Trauma-Folgen.

trans-unit.source: Each operative type unlocks a school of abilities. Spy abilities reveal enemy weaknesses. Guardian abilities protect allies. Saboteur abilities deal area damage. Propagandist abilities manipulate enemy stress. Infiltrator abilities bypass defenses. Assassin abilities deal concentrated damage. Higher agent aptitudes unlock stronger abilities within each school.
trans-unit.target: Jeder Agententyp schaltet eine Schule von Fähigkeiten frei. Spion-Fähigkeiten enthüllen feindliche Schwächen. Wächter-Fähigkeiten schützen Verbündete. Saboteur-Fähigkeiten verursachen Flächenschaden. Propagandist-Fähigkeiten manipulieren feindlichen Stress. Infiltrator-Fähigkeiten umgehen Verteidigungen. Assassinen-Fähigkeiten verursachen konzentrierten Schaden. Höhere Agenten-Eignungen schalten stärkere Fähigkeiten innerhalb jeder Schule frei.

trans-unit.source: After defeating the boss, you enter the Debrief Terminal – a loot distribution phase where you assign rewards to individual party members. Loot includes aptitude boosts (capped at +2 per agent to prevent runaway power), memories that shape agent personality, moodlets that affect behavior, and event modifiers that influence future resonances.
trans-unit.target: Nach dem Besiegen des Bosses betrittst du das Abschluss-Terminal – eine Loot-Verteilungsphase, in der du einzelnen Trupp-Mitgliedern Belohnungen zuweist. Loot umfasst Eignungs-Verstärkungen (begrenzt auf +2 pro Agent gegen unkontrollierte Machtsteigerung), Erinnerungen die die Agenten-Persönlichkeit formen, Moodlets die das Verhalten beeinflussen, und Ereignis-Modifikatoren die zukünftige Resonanzen beeinflussen.

trans-unit.source: The coordinates you provided do not match any known location in the multiverse.
trans-unit.target: Die von dir angegebenen Koordinaten stimmen mit keinem bekannten Ort im Multiversum überein.

trans-unit.source: Not in a dungeon. Type "dungeon" to enter one.
trans-unit.target: Nicht in einem Dungeon. Tippe "dungeon" um einen zu betreten.

trans-unit.source: Type "status" for current state, "retreat" to leave.
trans-unit.target: Tippe "status" für den aktuellen Zustand, "retreat" zum Verlassen.

trans-unit.source: That dungeon is not available (cooldown active or no resonance).
trans-unit.target: Dieser Dungeon ist nicht verfügbar (Abklingzeit aktiv oder keine Resonanz).

trans-unit.source: Failed to load agents. Try again.
trans-unit.target: Agenten konnten nicht geladen werden. Versuche es erneut.

trans-unit.source: Need at least 2 agents for a dungeon party. Recruit more agents first.
trans-unit.target: Mindestens 2 Agenten für einen Dungeon-Trupp nötig. Rekrutiere zuerst mehr Agenten.

trans-unit.source: Type "move <number>" to move to a room.
Cannot reach that room. Move to an adjacent room.
trans-unit.target: Raum nicht erreichbar. Bewege dich zu einem angrenzenden Raum.

trans-unit.source: Exit available. Type "retreat" to leave with your loot.
trans-unit.target: Ausgang verfügbar. Tippe "retreat" um mit deinem Loot zu fliehen.

trans-unit.source: Not all items assigned. Use "assign" first.
trans-unit.target: Nicht alle Items zugewiesen. Nutze zuerst "assign".
Tippe "interact <number>" um eine Option zu wählen.

trans-unit.source: No encounter choices available. Try "look" first.
All actions selected. Type "submit" to execute.
trans-unit.target: Alle Aktionen ausgewählt. Tippe "submit" zum Ausführen.

trans-unit.source: Actions submitted. Waiting for other players...
trans-unit.target: Aktionen übermittelt. Warte auf andere Spieler...

trans-unit.source: Type "map" to see the dungeon layout, "move <room>" to move.
trans-unit.target: Tippe "map" für das Dungeon-Layout, "move <room>" zum Bewegen.

trans-unit.source: A fragile pocket of stillness in the darkness.
trans-unit.target: Eine zerbrechliche Blase der Stille in der Dunkelheit.

trans-unit.source: Use "rest" to recover stress. Risk of ambush.
The darkness is thicker here. Absolute. Intentional.
trans-unit.target: Die Dunkelheit ist hier dichter. Absolut. Beabsichtigt.

trans-unit.source: Use "retreat" to leave with partial loot.
trans-unit.target: Nutze "retreat" um mit teilweisem Loot zu fliehen.

trans-unit.source: Use the COMBAT BAR below or type "attack <agent> <ability> [target]" + "submit".
trans-unit.target: Nutze die KAMPFLEISTE unten oder tippe "attack <agent> <ability> [target]" + "submit".

trans-unit.source: V I C T O R Y
The shadows were waiting. Rest interrupted.
trans-unit.target: Die Schatten haben gewartet. Rast unterbrochen.

trans-unit.source: A moment of calm. Stress reduced.
trans-unit.target: Ein Moment der Ruhe. Stress reduziert.

trans-unit.source: The party rests, but tension lingers.
trans-unit.target: Der Trupp rastet, doch die Anspannung bleibt.

trans-unit.source: The party withdraws from the dungeon.
trans-unit.target: Der Trupp zieht sich aus dem Dungeon zurück.

trans-unit.source: All agents have fallen. The dungeon claims its due.
trans-unit.target: Alle Agenten sind gefallen. Der Dungeon fordert seinen Tribut.

trans-unit.source: Combat exceeded maximum rounds. The enemies retreat into the shadows.
trans-unit.target: Kampf hat maximale Rundenzahl überschritten. Die Feinde ziehen sich in die Schatten zurück.

trans-unit.source: Room cleared -- no spoils claimed. Stress penalty applied.
trans-unit.target: Raum gesäubert – keine Beute eingefordert. Stress-Malus angewendet.

trans-unit.source: All items assigned. Type "confirm" to finalize.
trans-unit.target: Alle Items zugewiesen. Tippe "confirm" zum Abschließen.

trans-unit.source: Dungeons appear when Substrate Resonance magnitude is high enough.
trans-unit.target: Dungeons erscheinen, wenn die Substrat-Resonanz-Stärke hoch genug ist.

trans-unit.source: Type "dungeon <archetype>" to enter. Example: dungeon shadow
trans-unit.target: Tippe "dungeon <archetype>" zum Betreten. Beispiel: dungeon shadow

trans-unit.source: No agents available in this simulation.
trans-unit.target: Keine Agenten in dieser Simulation verfügbar.

trans-unit.source: Each resonance type spawns a distinct dungeon archetype: The Shadow (darkness and visibility), The Tower (structural stability), The Devouring Mother (parasitic drain), The Deluge (rising water), The Overthrow (faction navigation), The Prometheus (crafting and combination), The Awakening (memory and psychology), The Entropy (restoration vs. speed). Archetype determines enemy types, room layouts, encounter difficulty, and available loot.

Visibility mechanic: 3 points, drain every 2 rooms, restore via combat, treasure, rest, and Spy Observe ability. At visibility 0: increased ambush chance (40%), no enemy preview, +25% stress. Risk-reward: finding loot at visibility 0 grants a 50% chance to upgrade loot tier.

Stability countdown: starts at 100, drains per room (faster at depth), per combat round, and on failed checks. At 0: forced evacuation with partial loot only. Guardian Reinforce ability restores +10. Reward: high stability (80+) at loot time grants a 50% chance to upgrade loot tier. Structures that seemed permanent reveal themselves as temporary.
Failed to save retreat. Progress will be recovered on next visit.
trans-unit.target: Rückzug konnte nicht gespeichert werden. Fortschritt wird beim nächsten Besuch wiederhergestellt.

trans-unit.source: Failed to save result. Progress will be recovered on next visit.
trans-unit.target: Ergebnis konnte nicht gespeichert werden. Fortschritt wird beim nächsten Besuch wiederhergestellt.

trans-unit.source: Everything here is becoming everything else.
trans-unit.target: Alles hier wird zu allem anderen.

trans-unit.source: Decay accumulates. It does not reverse on its own.
trans-unit.target: Verfall akkumuliert. Er kehrt sich nicht von selbst um.

trans-unit.source: Decay increases each floor and each combat round.
trans-unit.target: Verfall steigt mit jeder Etage und jeder Kampfrunde.
Nutzt BEWAHREN (Wächter) um die Auflösung zu verlangsamen.

trans-unit.source: At Decay 100, the party dissolves. No retreat.
trans-unit.target: Bei Verfall 100 löst sich der Trupp auf. Kein Rückzug.

trans-unit.source: Reinforce the differences. Or join the equilibrium.
trans-unit.target: Verstärkt die Unterschiede. Oder werdet Teil des Gleichgewichts.

trans-unit.source: The building remembers every footstep as a tremor.
trans-unit.target: Das Gebäude erinnert jeden Schritt als Erschütterung.

trans-unit.source: Each floor you ascend weakens the one beneath.
trans-unit.target: Jede Etage, die ihr aufsteigt, schwächt die darunterliegende.
Strukturelle Integrität sinkt mit jeder Etage.

trans-unit.source: At integrity 0, the building collapses. No retreat.
trans-unit.target: Bei Integrität 0 kollabiert das Gebäude. Kein Rückzug.

trans-unit.source: Reinforce what holds you up – or become what it buries.
trans-unit.target: Verstärkt, was euch trägt – oder werdet, was es begräbt.

trans-unit.source: The dungeon provides. The provision is the threat.
trans-unit.target: Der Dungeon versorgt euch. Die Versorgung ist die Bedrohung.

trans-unit.source: Everything here heals you. Everything here binds you.
trans-unit.target: Alles hier heilt euch. Alles hier bindet euch.

trans-unit.source: Attachment rises each floor. The dungeon heals stress in return.
trans-unit.target: Bindung steigt mit jeder Etage. Der Dungeon heilt dafür Stress.

trans-unit.source: Accepting gifts deepens the bond. Refusing costs stress.
trans-unit.target: Geschenke annehmen vertieft die Bindung. Ablehnung kostet Stress.

trans-unit.source: Use SEVER (Guardian) to cut the parasitic attachment.
trans-unit.target: Nutzt TRENNEN (Wächter) um die parasitäre Bindung zu kappen.

trans-unit.source: At Attachment 100, the party is incorporated. No exit.
trans-unit.target: Bei Bindung 100 wird der Trupp absorbiert. Kein Ausweg.

trans-unit.source: The warmth is genuine. The warmth is also the trap.
trans-unit.target: Die Wärme ist echt. Die Wärme ist auch die Falle.

trans-unit.source: You descend into the dark. Visibility is your lifeline –
trans-unit.target: Ihr steigt hinab ins Dunkel. Sichtbarkeit ist eure Lebensader –

trans-unit.source: when it fails, the shadows move closer.
trans-unit.target: versagt sie, rücken die Schatten näher.

trans-unit.source: Scout to reveal rooms. Observe to maintain sight.
trans-unit.target: Erkundet, um Räume aufzudecken. Beobachtet, um Sicht zu bewahren.

trans-unit.source: The darkness drains visibility each floor.
trans-unit.target: Die Dunkelheit entzieht Sichtbarkeit mit jeder Etage.

trans-unit.source: At Visibility 0, enemies strike first. Always.
trans-unit.target: Bei Sichtbarkeit 0 schlagen Feinde zuerst zu. Immer.

trans-unit.source: The darkness does not forgive blindness.
The building settles. Your agents descend – the stairs hold, this time.
trans-unit.target: Das Gebäude beruhigt sich. Eure Agenten steigen hinab – die Stufen halten, diesmal.

trans-unit.source: The darkness recedes. Your agents emerge – not unscathed, but something has been understood.
trans-unit.target: Die Dunkelheit weicht zurück. Eure Agenten tauchen auf – nicht unversehrt, aber etwas wurde verstanden.

trans-unit.source: Delete this content item? This cannot be undone.
Cascading default for all simulations without a local override.
Controls whether dungeon commands require a minimum clearance tier (earned by executing terminal commands).
All dungeon commands are available immediately, no clearance required.
Tier 2 unlocks after a custom number of commands.
The room is empty. Whatever was here has moved on.
trans-unit.target: Der Raum ist leer. Was hier war, ist weitergezogen.

trans-unit.source: No combat in progress. Use "move" to continue exploring.
Seal Breach is only available in Deluge dungeons.
Salvage is only available in Deluge dungeons.
Specify a room to salvage. Usage: salvage <room_index>
The water rises. Not fast. It has time.
What the flood takes, it keeps. What it spares, it marks.
Lower floors flood first. They also hold better salvage.
The tide recedes – briefly – every 3 rooms.
Each recession is smaller than the last.
Use SEAL (Guardian) to close the breaches.
Use SALVAGE to dive cleared rooms for submerged loot.
At water level 100: submersion. Total loss.
The waterline does not negotiate. Read it, or join it.
The collective mind turns over in its sleep.
Something in the architecture recognizes you. Not personally – collectively.
Awareness rises with each room. The deeper you go, the faster.
High awareness grants perception – but erodes certainty.
At Awareness 70: lucid state. The dungeon responds to thought.
Use GROUND (Spy) to reduce awareness. Grounding has a cooldown.
At Awareness 100: dissolution. Complete ego loss.
The dungeon does not read your thoughts. It resonates with them.
Power changes hands. The old order does not die – it metamorphoses.
trans-unit.target: Die Macht wechselt die Hände. Die alte Ordnung stirbt nicht – sie häutet sich.

trans-unit.source: Every NPC is a political actor. Every room is a negotiation.
trans-unit.target: Jeder Charakter ist ein politischer Akteur. Jeder Raum eine Verhandlung.

trans-unit.source: Authority fracture rises with each room. Factions shift.
trans-unit.target: Die Autorität zerbricht mit jedem Raum. Fraktionen kippen.

trans-unit.source: High fracture means betrayals, ambushes, and paranoia.
trans-unit.target: Hoher Bruch heißt Verrat, Hinterhalt, Paranoia.

trans-unit.source: At Fracture 60: revolution. The old order cracks.
trans-unit.target: Ab Bruchstärke 60: Revolution. Die alte Ordnung reißt.

trans-unit.source: Use RALLY (Propagandist) to reduce fracture. Rally has a cooldown.
trans-unit.target: RALLY (Propagandist) senkt den Bruch. Abklingzeit beachten.

trans-unit.source: At Fracture 100: total collapse. Power vacuum.
The Spiegelpalast shows everyone what they want to see. Not what they are.
trans-unit.target: Der Spiegelpalast zeigt jedem, was er sehen will. Nicht was er ist.

trans-unit.source: seals the breach. The water relents – briefly.
surfaces empty-handed. The water keeps what it took.
The Authors Who Forged This Place
An unexpected error occurred while renaming the conversation.
Connection lost during response. Reloading messages.
An edition for this exact period already exists. Generate another?
Resonance fracture opening into layered archetype chambers

Send your agents where reality fractures. Eight archetypal dungeons – each shaped by its own literary DNA, from existential dread to political vertigo. Your agents face stress, fight what lives in the fracture, and return carrying aptitudes, artifacts, and scars that reshape your civilization.

Your agents have memories, opinions, grudges. Now send them where reality fractures. Eight archetypal dungeons, each a different wound in the world – and a different test of what your civilization is made of.

Send agents into the fractures between worlds. Eight archetypal dungeons – procedurally generated, literarily informed – where stress is real and choices reshape who your agents become. What happens in the depths changes your world above.
This archetype detail page is not available yet. Explore the available archetypes below.
trans-unit.target: Diese Archetyp-Detailseite ist noch nicht verf\u00fcgbar. Erkunde die verf\u00fcgbaren Archetypen unten.
